Launches and executes JavaScript with JerryScript on Mbed OS, including headers for setup and execution.

## Folders
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Launches and executes JavaScript files using JerryScript and registers global properties for magic strings.

## Files
- **[launcher.h](launcher.h.md)**: Header file for launching and exiting JerryScript on Mbed OS.
- **[setup.h](setup.h.md)**: Header file for loading magic strings in the JerryScript mbed launcher.
